title: Perfection
description: A lightweight aesthetic modpack focused on visual enhancements, particles, and immersive builds—no grind, just pure visual perfection.
body:
![Perfection banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90a04f175d2eb1b309d839d19882c8f168fdf0cc.png)

Perfection is a modpack that enhances vanilla Minecraft with small but impactful improvements. Experience smoother animations, realistic water wakes, better explosions, and subtle tweaks that make the game feel more alive — all while staying true to the original Minecraft vibe.
